---
image: website-photo.jpg
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15rem
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/tselmena
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tselmen-anuurad/
---

Hello there! My name is Tselmen Anuurad, but I usually go by Tsel (pronounced like "cell"). I am currently a senior at the **University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)** studying **Statistics and Data Science**, expected to graduate June 2026. I began my undergraduate education journey at **Sacramento City College** prior to my transfer to UCLA.

After graduation, I plan to pursue doctoral studies in Biostatistics. I am very excited about the intersection of statistics and public health, and I look forward to using biostatistical methods to create real-world public health solutions!
